lastReleaseMessage: Restore dates.ts after a botched regex replacement in the...

barRaise.topFinding: The ship gate has now failed for a second straight cycle and the working tree is dirtier, not cleaner. The doc cohort the last reports flagged (CHANGELOG v0.4.0/v0.4.1 dates -> 2026-06-07, docs/DESIGN.md rebrand) is still correct on disk and uncommitted; HEAD has not moved off 890b493 (2026-06-13) in two days. On top of it a good new FUSE git-safety subsystem landed and is also uncommitted: scripts/git-guard.ps1 plus its wiring into push-to-github.ps1 and write-dashboard-status.ps1. That file's own header records that FUSE NUL-truncation has already corrupted .git itself on this mount (truncated config, lost the main ref), so the safety net is sitting outside the repo. Scheduler is committable from this session right now (main level with origin, no live lock), so nothing external blocks it. It is one command from done: cd X:\YesAndScheduler; .\scripts\release.ps1, or a plain commit.
